# Introvera

> Custom software development, websites, POS systems, admin panels, and mobile apps. We build scalable business solutions worldwide.

Introvera is a premium software development agency based in Sri Lanka, serving clients globally including the USA, Europe, UAE, and Australia. We specialize in designing and engineering high-performance digital products that solve real operational challenges.

## Core Services
- **Web Development**: Custom websites, landing pages, and full-scale web applications.
- **Mobile App Development**: Cross-platform iOS and Android apps using Flutter.
- **Custom Business Software**: Tailored POS (Point of Sale) systems, ERP platforms, and Admin Portals.
- **UI/UX Design**: Wireframing, prototyping, and pixel-perfect interface design.
- **Backend/API**: RESTful APIs, database optimization, and microservices architecture.
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Infrastructure setup, CI/CD, and scalable deployments.
- **Business Process Automation**: Workflow automation and legacy system modernization.

## Our Approach
We follow a strict, transparent four-step agile methodology:
1. Discovery & Planning
2. Design & Prototype
3. Development & Testing
4. Launch & Support

## Contact Information
- **Website**: https://introvera.com
- **Email**: contact@introvera.com
- **Services**: https://introvera.com/services
- **Portfolio**: https://introvera.com/projects
